NL

Dutch Learning Portal

v3.5.2 · Lisa + Ahmed test
Preservation rule
Each lesson keeps the original formatted DOCX-derived content. Grammar, vocab, homework and writing are extracted on top.
Export safe
Data is embedded as raw application/json, not as escaped HTML attributes.

Overview

A complete, searchable Dutch lesson portal built from your uploaded DOCX.

Built as a standalone file. Keep your latest exported HTML as your master copy.
